name: "Stupid... STUPID CarePad... Taking my glory..." - BonusPad
description:
"And the winner goes to... CarePad!" - Announcer

"Wh-what..? That can't be right..." - BonusPad

A few hours later, BonusPad arrives at CarePad's shed

"I know you're there, brother." - CarePad

"Don't call me that.

"Why are you even here in the first place?"

"You cheated. I know you did."

"Mad because you lost?"

"No. I'm mad because THIS." he points to CarePad's invention "shouldn't have won."

CarePad hides something behind his back "it's nothing simple. Better then your little particle accelerator."

BonusPad grabs what CarePad was hiding behind his back "what is this? Some sort of gun? You plannin' to shoot me?"

CarePad lunges for the gun "Give that back it's dangerous."

BonusPad holds it out of reach "I'd rather see what it does..." He shoots it at the wall, and it creates some sort of portal.

"What have you done..." CarePad stares at the portal in shock, no longer reaching for the gun.

COUGH COUGH COUGH... Ignore that up there.. but BonusPad bot! Here!!! Yay!!!
creator: TheYangReaper
